title: Get settings
summary: Read saved and effective Settings V2 documents, adapter descriptors, diagnostics, secret states, and activation status.

response.name: saved_config
response.description: Saved candidate document with secrets masked.

response.name: restart_required
response.description: True when saved and effective revisions differ.

response.name: activation_status
response.description: Activation state for the saved revision.

response.name: activation_errors
response.description: Activation errors when startup kept the older effective revision.

response.name: diagnostics
response.description: Runtime-derived paths and health summaries used by the Dashboard.

response.name: adapters
response.description: Available, unavailable, and invalid adapter descriptors with options schemas.

response.name: secret_states
response.description: Secret configuration states such as configured, missing_env, or not_set; secret values are never returned.

title: Validate settings
summary: Validate a full Runtime Settings document without saving it. Responses include normalized config and field-level errors.

title: Check settings area
summary: Run local capability checks for one settings area such as model, storage.metadata, storage.artifacts, memory, or sandbox.

parameters.name: full_config
parameters.description: Complete candidate used for cross-field context.

response.name: ok
response.description: True if all local checks passed or were skipped.

response.name: errors
response.description: Validation errors when the candidate area cannot be checked.

title: Save settings
summary: Persist a validated complete Runtime Settings document as a new saved revision. Runtime activation occurs on restart.

response.name: saved_config
response.description: Saved candidate document with secrets masked.

response.name: activation_status
response.description: Activation state for the saved revision.

response.name: activation_errors
response.description: Activation errors when startup kept the older effective revision.

response.name: diagnostics
response.description: Runtime-derived paths and health summaries used by the Dashboard.

response.name: secret_states
response.description: Secret configuration states such as configured, missing_env, or not_set; secret values are never returned.

title: Restart runtime
summary: Request runtime restart so saved settings can become effective.
